title: Operation Breakout
description:
Список возможностей- Free server hosting to up to 64 players
- First person & third person
- Realistic graphics and sounds
- Chat system
- Weapon skins
- Chat system 
- Epic graphics 
- Skins (for weapons) 
- Customizable slots

Steam GreenlightThis game has been chosen to be Greenlit by the Steam community, enjoy playing!

Об игреDescription

Operation Breakout is a renewed multiplayer shooter that's provided to you by SGTTB.
In this fantastic shooter you'll need to bundle strategy, skills and reaction rate to get to the absolute top!
The great textures, realistic sound effects and exciting events make the game everything but boring!
Explore and create own strategies to help you win this war. This is NO Pay2Win!

Game Servers

Hosting servers in Operation Breakout is 100% free!
Creating servers will be done automaticly on one of the connected PC's and will be exited automaticly aswell.
No costs and easy to use!
description_short: A fantastic FPS to play together with your friends or alone.Go into the savage world of Operation Breakout and get yourself to the top!A great game without Pay2Win!
